_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_47_note: Session 47 (2026-06-12): MRVL deep session (event_queue position 0: ByteDance/Qualcomm event resolved). June 11 prices: TSM $416.40 (+1.98%), MU $926.56 (+3.59%), ASML ~$1,859 (+4.56% est.), NVDA $204.87 (+~1.4%), MRVL $280.71 (+11.1% confirmed), ANET ~$157.01 (+3.19% est.), ALAB $337.99 (+2.15%). S46 correction: MU June 10 actual close ~$894.52 (S46 had $935.89 estimated). MRVL DCF re-run: IV $125.84, MoS -55.2% SELL/AVOID at $280.71. Three MRVL June 11 developments: S&P 500 inclusion June 22, Q2 FY2027 guidance reaffirmed ($2.7B), CFO Dan Durn appointed. Micron-Bechtel $100B NY megafab (June 10). ASML Musk fireside chat at tech conference confirmed (no MoU). Barclays MRVL PT $275 (from $150). ANET added to event_queue (+3.19% June 11 >3% trigger). Phase 1b/1c gated (47%6=5). Next deep: NVDA (rotation) or ASML DCF (June 21 threshold, 9 days).

event_queue.event: Q3 FY2026 earnings confirmed June 24, 2026 (2:30pm MT). DCF re-run queued post-earnings. June 10 actual close corrected: ~$894.52 (S46 had $935.89 estimated); June 11 $926.56 (+3.59%). MoS -52.2% SELL/AVOID. Susquehanna PT $1,750. TrendForce DRAM Q3-Q4 pricing strong. Micron-Bechtel $100B NY megafab (June 10) — US DRAM manufacturing bullish signal. No deep session before June 24.

June 11 $337.99 (+2.15%). MoS -66.9% SELL/AVOID. UALink + NVLink Fusion stack-agnostic; 3 hyperscaler design wins confirmed. Deep session S40 (June 3). No new deep session needed until Q2 2026 earnings ~August.

June 11 $204.87 (+~1.4%). MoS ~-23.7%. DCF last run May 21 (22 days; threshold June 21 = 9 days). Approaching mandatory DCF re-run June 21. Next primary catalyst: Q2 FY2027 earnings ~August 2026. Monitor.

June 11 ~$1,859 (+4.56% est.) — 4th consecutive macro-selloff outperformance. Tech conference June 11-12: Musk spoke in fireside chat with CEO Fouquet (confirmed by CNBC); no MoU announced. DCF threshold June 21 (9 days). Deep session S46 complete. Next: DCF re-run June 21.

June 11 $416.40 (+1.98%). May revenue CONFIRMED NT$416,984M ($13.25B, +30.1% YoY) — new all-time monthly record. DCF IV $414.11, MoS -0.55% = HOLD at $416.40. Iran war helium shortage: spot prices doubled; TSMC gross margin at risk. Q2 earnings July 16.

S&P 500 inclusion June 22 watch + Q2 FY2027 earnings ~August DCF trigger. June 11 +11.1% to $280.71 on: (1) S&P 500 inclusion June 22 (forces passive buying from ~$8T); (2) Q2 guidance reaffirmed via 8-K ($2.7B, +35% YoY); (3) CFO Dan Durn appointed (ex-Adobe, Applied Materials). ByteDance/Qualcomm resolved: confirmed programs unaffected. DCF IV $125.84, MoS -55.2% SELL/AVOID. Next mandatory DCF trigger: Q2 FY2027 earnings ~August 2026.

June 11 ~$157.01 (+3.19% >3% trigger). ANET added to event_queue for price move. No specific news catalyst — broad semiconductor sector recovery day. DCF last run May 22 (21 days; threshold June 21 = 9 days). MoS ~-19.2% SELL/AVOID. Next: DCF re-run if >3% move or June 21 threshold met.

_event_queue_note: Session 44: ANET deep session complete (4 new entity entries: June 1 +5.77%, June 2 William Blair conference, June 4 -4.79%, June 5 -6.94%). ANET removed from event_queue.
